header.headline: RoPE Detailed
header.subtitle: Rotary position encoding turns position into phase, so relative structure survives inside attention.

left.title: Coordinate view
left.body: Split channels into paired dimensions and rotate them by a position-dependent angle.

right.title: Relative view
right.body: Because both query and key rotate, their relative phase carries distance information into attention.

panels.title: Phase bands
panels.summary: Different frequency bands rotate at different rates, giving the model coarse and fine positional signals.

panels.title: Rotate Q and K
panels.summary: Queries and keys are transformed before dot products, so position changes the interaction directly.
panels.note: Position enters as structure, not as prose.

panels.title: Long context pressure
panels.summary: Scaling context still needs care, but RoPE gives a clean deterministic base for long-range reasoning.
panels.note: Good priors still need disciplined scaling.

callout.title: Key takeaway
points: RoPE is easiest to learn as geometry, not as formula memorization.
Structured editorial layouts help surface that intuition.
